chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 895 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 29-05-2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ******* Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
